# KIRA RESEARCH
> Southeast Asia's specialized market intelligence firm. Senior analysts, modern delivery.

## About
KIRA RESEARCH produces market research reports focused on Southeast Asia — covering Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, and adjacent markets. Our research combines senior analyst insight with structured data to deliver actionable intelligence for investors, corporate strategy teams, and regional operators.

We are a research house, not a data platform. Every report is produced and quality-reviewed by our analyst team.

## What We Publish

### Market Research Reports
Downloadable PDF reports covering specific industries, countries, and market segments across Southeast Asia. Topics include FMCG, fintech, logistics, e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, agribusiness, and more.

- Browse all reports: https://kiraresearch.com/en/library
- Reports are available in English, Japanese, and Korean
- Priced at $39 per report (Year 1 flat pricing)

### Insights
Free articles and field notes covering market trends, regulatory shifts, and sector developments across the region.

- Browse all insights: https://kiraresearch.com/en/insights/

### Company Intelligence
Structured profiles for 250+ companies across Vietnam and Japan, with legal registration data, financials, and analyst narratives.

- Vietnam companies: https://kiraresearch.com/en/companies/vn/
- Search companies: https://kiraresearch.com/en/companies/

## Coverage Areas

**Countries:** Vietnam · Indonesia · Thailand · Singapore · Malaysia · Philippines · Japan · South Korea · Australia · New Zealand

**Industries:** FMCG · Fintech · E-commerce · Logistics · Healthcare · Real Estate · Agribusiness · Energy · Manufacturing · Retail · Banking & Finance · Technology

## Who We Serve
- Foreign investors entering Southeast Asian markets
- Corporate strategy teams at regional conglomerates
- Private equity and venture capital firms
- Government and trade bodies
- Academic researchers

## Methodology
Our research process combines primary data collection, regulatory filings, local-language sources, and analyst synthesis. Reports are not AI-generated marketing content — they are structured intelligence products produced by regional specialists.

Full methodology: https://kiraresearch.com/en/methodology

## Custom Research
We accept custom research mandates for clients who need bespoke coverage outside our standard library.

Contact: https://kiraresearch.com/en/custom-research/
